description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house enclosed by a low perimeter wall and surrounded by a manicured lawn and palm trees. The structure features extensive floor-to-ceiling glass windows, providing abundant natural light and a sleek, contemporary appearance. The front facade includes a prominent balcony with a pergola, shaded outdoor seating, and a swimming pool area lined with palm trees. The rear side of the house has a bold red door and a more private, minimalist design with fewer windows. The roof is primarily flat, with some sections featuring open slats or pergolas for partial shade. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, geometric lines, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, glass-fronted multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a pool, and palm landscaping, enclosed by a low wall. The design features open balconies, pergolas, and a bold red rear door.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main glass facade, balcony with pergola, pool, palm trees, and the main entry area.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the pool area, palm trees, and the layered structure of the house with large windows and green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the bold red door, more private window arrangement, and the open lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the pool, palm trees, and the solid wall with minimal windows, emphasizing privacy.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door, shaded by a pergola, with steps leading up and a landscaped approach lined with palm trees.
